summary: This candidate is currently performing at a 1-2 level, but needs to reach a 3-4 level to be competitive. They are missing signals in quantification of impact and tradeoff awareness. They need to improve their ability to articulate their ideas and make informed technical decisions.

top_strengths.title: Strong Communication Skills
top_strengths.description: The candidate has good communication skills, as evident from their high scores in communication clarity and confidence signal.

top_strengths.title: Good Seniority Alignment
top_strengths.description: The candidate has a good understanding of their seniority level, as reflected in their high score in seniority alignment.

top_strengths.title: Basic Technical Knowledge
top_strengths.description: The candidate has a basic understanding of technical concepts, as evident from their moderate scores in technical depth and technical preference.

key_improvement_areas.title: Lack of Quantification of Impact
key_improvement_areas.description: The candidate struggles to articulate the impact of their work, as reflected in their low score in quantification impact.

key_improvement_areas.title: Poor Tradeoff Awareness
key_improvement_areas.description: The candidate lacks the ability to make informed tradeoff decisions, as evident from their low score in tradeoff awareness.
